risk_if_not_implemented: Without Real-Time or Layered Notice, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Cybersecurity & Data Protection Attributes
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to bind cybersecurity and data protection attributes to information as it is stored, transmitted and processed.
compensating_control_1.justification: Cybersecurity & Data Protection Attributes (DCH-05) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Real-Time or Layered Notice (PRI-02.7) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Real-Time or Layered Notice (PRI-02.7) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
